# Pull Request

## Summary
- What does this PR do? Why is it needed?

## Related Issues
- Closes #
- Related #

## Changes
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / Tooling

## How to Test
1. Steps to verify the change locally
2. Expected results

## Screenshots / Demos (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck` and `npm run build`
- [ ] I ran tests (`npm test`) and they pass
- [ ] I updated docs (README/CHANGELOG) if needed
- [ ] I considered security implications

## Notes
- Any additional context for reviewers
